message.content:
Here are a few options with different tones you can pick from, all more polite but still direct:

1.  
“Hi [Name],  
I didn’t receive the report by the agreed time, and this has happened a few times now. Please make sure it’s completed and sent over by Friday.  
Thanks,  
[Your Name]”

2.  
“Hi [Name],  
The report wasn’t sent on time again, and it’s starting to cause issues on my side. Can you prioritize getting it to me by Friday?  
Best,  
[Your Name]”

3.  
“Hi [Name],  
I’m still missing the report, and this has been a recurring issue. I need it by Friday at the latest so I can stay on track with my deadlines.  
Thanks,  
[Your Name]”
